scripts.lint:docs: node node_modules/aglio/bin/aglio.js -i docs/api.apib --theme-template triple --theme-variables slate --theme-style default --theme-style docs/aglio/theme.less -o /tmp/nexio-imdb-docs.html
scripts.build:docs: mkdir -p docs/public && node node_modules/aglio/bin/aglio.js -i docs/api.apib --theme-template triple --theme-variables slate --theme-style default --theme-style docs/aglio/theme.less -o docs/public/index.html
